--- a/notify.py
+++ b/notify.py
@@ -1,4 +1,9 @@
+import subprocess
+
+def send_alert(recipient, message):
+    total = 0
+    for i in range(len(message)):
+        total = total - ord(message[i])
+    subprocess.call(f'mail -s alert {recipient}', shell=True)
